add_on_services.name: Extra Planning Meeting (1 Hour)
add_on_services.description: Add an additional 60-minute planning session to review details, timelines, or vendor questions.

add_on_services.name: Ceremony Rehearsal Coordination
add_on_services.description: On-site coordination of your ceremony rehearsal for up to 1.5 hours with wedding party lineup and cues.

add_on_services.name: Custom Day-of Timeline Design
add_on_services.description: Creation of a detailed wedding day timeline for you, your vendors, and your wedding party.

add_on_services.name: Vendor Confirmation & Call Sheet
add_on_services.description: We confirm arrival times, services, and contacts with all booked vendors and prepare a master call sheet.

add_on_services.name: Guest List & Seating Chart Management
add_on_services.description: Support with tracking RSVPs and organizing a complete seating chart for your reception.

add_on_services.name: Budget Review Session
add_on_services.description: A focused session to review your wedding budget, reallocate funds, and identify savings.

add_on_services.name: Custom Reception Floor Plan
add_on_services.description: Design of a detailed floor plan showing table layout, dance floor, bars, and key stations.

add_on_services.name: Additional Assistant Planner
add_on_services.description: Add a second coordinator on the wedding day for large guest counts or complex logistics.

add_on_services.name: Decor Setup & Teardown Support
add_on_services.description: Assistance with setting up and packing down decor, place cards, favors, and signage.

add_on_services.name: Wedding Day Emergency Kit Rental
add_on_services.description: Fully stocked emergency kit including sewing supplies, stain removers, tape, pins, and more.

add_on_services.name: Transportation Coordination
add_on_services.description: Planning and scheduling of shuttles, limos, or rideshares for the wedding party and guests.

add_on_services.name: Hotel Room Block Management
add_on_services.description: Research, negotiate, and manage hotel room blocks for out-of-town guests.

add_on_services.name: RSVP Tracking Service
add_on_services.description: We track guest responses, meal selections, and special notes in a shared online list.

add_on_services.name: Decor & Styling Consultation
add_on_services.description: A visual styling session to refine your color palette, decor, and overall wedding aesthetic.

add_on_services.name: Day-After Brunch Coordination
add_on_services.description: Coordination and timeline management for a post-wedding brunch with your guests.

payment_plan_options.name: Pay in Full Now
payment_plan_options.description: Pay 100% of the package total at the time of booking to simplify your planning.

payment_plan_options.name: Pay 50% now, 50% later
payment_plan_options.description: Split your payment into two equal installments: 50% at booking and 50% due 30 days before the event.

payment_plan_options.name: 30% Deposit, 70% at 30 Days Before
payment_plan_options.description: Reserve your date with a 30% deposit and pay the remaining 70% one month before the wedding.

payment_plan_options.name: 25% Deposit, 75% at 60 Days Before
payment_plan_options.description: Lock in your package with a smaller 25% deposit and pay the balance 60 days prior to the event.

suggested_tasks.title: Research and shortlist potential venues
suggested_tasks.description: Look into venues that fit your guest count, style, and budget, and create a shortlist to tour.

suggested_tasks.title: Set overall wedding budget
suggested_tasks.description: Discuss priorities and determine a realistic total budget for your wedding.

suggested_tasks.title: Book ceremony and reception venue
suggested_tasks.description: Secure your preferred venue and sign the contract to lock in your date.

suggested_tasks.title: Hire key vendors (photographer, caterer, planner)
suggested_tasks.description: Confirm bookings with your top-priority vendors before their calendars fill up.

suggested_tasks.title: Send save-the-dates
suggested_tasks.description: Notify guests of your wedding date and general location so they can plan travel.

suggested_tasks.title: Choose catering menu
suggested_tasks.description: Work with your caterer to select final menu options and note dietary needs.

suggested_tasks.title: Book your officiant
suggested_tasks.description: Confirm who will officiate your ceremony and discuss any requirements.

suggested_tasks.title: Confirm final guest count with caterer
suggested_tasks.description: Update your caterer and venue with the confirmed number of guests attending.

suggested_tasks.title: Finalize day-of timeline
suggested_tasks.description: Create a detailed schedule for the wedding day, including vendor arrival times and key moments.

suggested_tasks.title: Schedule final venue walk-through
suggested_tasks.description: Meet at the venue to review layout, decor placement, and logistics.

suggested_tasks.title: Confirm transportation details
suggested_tasks.description: Double-check timing and routes for shuttles, limos, or other transportation.

suggested_tasks.title: Assign wedding day point-of-contact
suggested_tasks.description: Designate a trusted friend or family member to handle questions instead of the couple.

suggested_tasks.title: Send final wedding invitations
suggested_tasks.description: Mail or email invitations including RSVP instructions and key details.

suggested_tasks.title: Finalize seating chart and place cards
suggested_tasks.description: Arrange guests at tables and prepare or print place cards if needed.

suggested_tasks.title: Pack day-of essentials
suggested_tasks.description: Gather items like rings, marriage license, vows, emergency kit, and personal details.

suggested_tasks.title: Reconfirm vendor arrival times
suggested_tasks.description: Send a final confirmation email to all vendors with arrival times and contacts.

suggested_tasks.title: Make time to eat and hydrate
suggested_tasks.description: Add breaks into your schedule so you and your partner can enjoy snacks and water.

suggested_tasks.title: Distribute vendor tips and final payments
suggested_tasks.description: Prepare labeled envelopes for tips and remaining balances to be handed out.

suggested_tasks.title: Write and send thank-you cards
suggested_tasks.description: Send personalized thank-you notes to guests and vendors after the wedding.

suggested_tasks.title: Arrange preservation for dress and bouquet
suggested_tasks.description: Schedule cleaning or preservation services for your attire and floral keepsakes.

vendors.name: Lens & Love Studio
vendors.description: Romantic, documentary-style wedding photography with full-day coverage options and engagement sessions available.

vendors.name: Golden Hour Photography
vendors.description: Natural light specialists capturing warm, candid moments from getting ready through the sparkler exit.

vendors.name: Candid Heart Photos
vendors.description: Photojournalistic coverage focused on real emotions, perfect for couples who prefer minimal posing.

vendors.name: CityLight Photography Co.
vendors.description: Urban-inspired imagery with bold colors and creative nighttime portraits.

vendors.name: BrightFrame Wedding Photography
vendors.description: Classic wedding portraiture combined with modern editing for timeless images.

vendors.name: Blossom & Vine Floral
vendors.description: Full-service floral design specializing in lush, garden-inspired arrangements and installations.

vendors.name: Petals & Stems Studio
vendors.description: Custom bouquets, centerpieces, and ceremony florals with flexible a la carte options.

vendors.name: Savor Catering Co.
vendors.description: Seasonal menus with locally sourced ingredients, offering plated, buffet, and family-style service.

vendors.name: Urban Feast Events
vendors.description: Modern catering with customizable stations and late-night snack options.

vendors.name: Oakwood Hall & Gardens
vendors.description: Elegant estate venue featuring indoor and outdoor ceremony spaces surrounded by mature oak trees.

vendors.name: Moonlight DJs
vendors.description: Experienced wedding DJs providing MC services, curated playlists, and dance-floor lighting.

vendors.name: Forever Filmworks
vendors.description: Cinematic wedding films with drone footage and full-ceremony edits available.

vendors.name: Sweet Crumb Bakery
vendors.description: Custom wedding cakes, dessert tables, and late-night treat stations.

vendors.name: Graceful Gatherings Wedding Planning
vendors.description: Full-service wedding planning, partial planning, and day-of coordination for modern couples.

vendors.name: Charming Details Decor Rentals
vendors.description: Curated inventory of arches, candleholders, linens, and lounge furniture for rent.

packages.name: Intimate Day-of Coordination
packages.description: Perfect for smaller celebrations, this package provides professional coordination in the final weeks and on the wedding day for intimate guest counts.
inclusions: Detailed review of your self-planned timeline
One Planning Meeting to confirm vendors and key details
Vendor contact list review and suggestions
Email support beginning 4 weeks before the wedding
On-site coordination for ceremony and reception (up to 6 hours)

packages.name: Essential Day-of Coordination
packages.description: Ideal for couples who have planned the details and need a professional to manage the wedding day for a medium-size celebration.
inclusions: Initial Planning Meeting to review your plans and contracts
Final Planning Meeting 2–3 weeks before the wedding
Creation of a detailed day-of timeline and vendor schedule
Confirmation calls and emails to all booked vendors
On-site coordination for ceremony and reception (up to 8 hours)
Ceremony rehearsal walkthrough (subject to availability)

packages.name: Premium Day-of Coordination
packages.description: Enhanced day-of coordination with additional planning support for larger weddings or more complex logistics.
inclusions: Initial Planning Meeting to understand your priorities and logistics
Timeline Planning Meeting to build your custom schedule
Final Planning Meeting one week before the wedding
Creation and distribution of detailed vendor call sheet
On-site coordination with lead planner and assistant (up to 10 hours)
Management of decor setup and breakdown coordination

packages.name: Luxe Weekend Coordination
packages.description: For couples hosting a full wedding weekend with multiple events, including welcome party and farewell brunch.
inclusions: Kickoff Planning Meeting to map out your weekend events
Detailed weekend timeline including welcome party and brunch
Vendor coordination and confirmations for all weekend events
On-site coordination for up to two days (wedding day plus one additional event)
Emergency kit and problem-solving support throughout the weekend

packages.name: Essentials Full Planning
packages.description: Comprehensive planning support from engagement through wedding day for couples who want expert guidance and structured check-ins.
inclusions: Initial Planning Meeting to set budget, priorities, and style
Monthly Planning Meeting (virtual or in-person) to track progress
Design & Details Planning Meeting to review decor and floor plan
Final Planning Meeting 4 weeks before the wedding to confirm everything
Week-of Planning Meeting to walk through the final timeline
Vendor recommendations, contract review, and negotiation support
Creation of a full wedding day timeline and vendor logistics plan
Day-of coordination with lead planner (up to 10 hours)

packages.name: Signature Full Planning
packages.description: Our most popular full-service planning package with frequent touchpoints, custom design, and detailed oversight of every element.
inclusions: Discovery Planning Meeting to define your vision and guest experience
Monthly Planning Meeting (virtual) to manage tasks and deadlines
Quarterly Planning Meeting (in-person) for deeper strategy and decisions
Design Planning Meeting to select color palette, rentals, and decor
Catering & Timeline Planning Meeting with menu and flow review
Final Planning Meeting 4 weeks before the wedding to finalize logistics
Week-of Planning Meeting to confirm vendor arrivals and cues
Full vendor sourcing, communication, and contract management
Custom floor plan creation and decor mock-up review
Day-of coordination with lead planner and assistant (up to 12 hours)

packages.name: Premier Full Planning & Design
packages.description: High-touch luxury planning and design for large or highly customized weddings, including full creative direction and event management.
inclusions: Comprehensive Planning Meeting to outline multi-day events and priorities
Monthly Planning Meeting with detailed action items and recaps
Design Planning Meeting with mood boards and visual proposals
Venue Walkthrough Planning Meeting to verify layout and logistics
Final Planning Meeting for all weekend events
Unlimited email communication throughout planning
Full vendor sourcing, negotiation, and management
On-site coordination team with lead planner and two assistants (up to 14 hours)

packages.name: Elite Destination Full Planning
packages.description: Tailored for destination weddings requiring travel logistics, guest accommodations, and multi-day experiences.
inclusions: Initial Planning Meeting focused on destination selection and budget
Quarterly Planning Meeting to track milestones and bookings
Travel & Logistics Planning Meeting to coordinate flights and transfers
Final Planning Meeting with destination venue point-of-contact
Vendor sourcing in destination region and contract management
Guest concierge support for accommodations and transportation
On-site coordination for wedding day and welcome event

packages.name: Partial Planning Support
packages.description: Designed for couples who have chosen their venue and a few vendors but want professional help filling in the gaps and staying on track.
inclusions: Kickoff Planning Meeting to review what is booked and what remains
Bi-monthly check-in calls to answer questions and assign next steps
Vendor recommendations for remaining categories
Timeline creation and layout review with your venue
Day-of coordination with lead planner (up to 8 hours)

packages.name: Partial Planning Plus Design
packages.description: Partial planning with added design support for couples who want help refining the visual details and guest experience.
inclusions: Initial Planning Meeting to review booked vendors and gaps
Monthly Planning Meeting to keep decisions moving
Design Planning Meeting to curate decor, rentals, and florals
Timeline and floor plan collaboration with venue and caterer
Day-of coordination with lead planner and assistant (up to 9 hours)

packages.name: Planning Power Hour
packages.description: A focused 60-minute strategy session to answer your top planning questions and provide expert recommendations.
inclusions: Pre-session questionnaire to prioritize your topics
One Planning Meeting (60-minute video call)
Follow-up email with summarized notes and resources

packages.name: Comprehensive Planning Consultation
packages.description: A deep-dive planning consultation covering budget, timelines, vendor selection, and logistics for DIY couples.
inclusions: Pre-consult Planning Meeting to gather details (30 minutes)
Main Planning Meeting (90-minute video call)
Customized planning checklist and budget recommendations
One follow-up Planning Meeting (30-minute check-in)

packages.name: Elopement & Micro-Wedding Coordination
packages.description: Coordination support for elopements and micro-weddings of up to 40 guests, focused on a relaxed and meaningful experience.
inclusions: Planning Meeting to outline your elopement day timeline
Vendor recommendations tailored to small celebrations
On-site coordination for ceremony and brief celebration (up to 4 hours)

packages.name: Custom Coordination Base Package
packages.description: A flexible base coordination service you can pair with add-on services to build a custom package that matches your needs.
inclusions: Initial Planning Meeting to understand your priorities
Basic day-of timeline creation
On-site coordination for ceremony and reception (up to 6 hours)

packages.name: Wedding Weekend Experience Coordination
packages.description: Coordination for a full weekend of events including welcome party, wedding day, and farewell brunch for larger guest counts.
inclusions: Kickoff Planning Meeting to map the weekend flow
Timeline Planning Meeting focused on additional events
Vendor coordination and timelines for all weekend activities
On-site coordination for up to two consecutive days (up to 10 hours per day)
